title: Nursing Fundamentals Sample Test
description: A Moodle-style sample test for nursing students preparing for a fundamentals exam.

questions.prompt: Which action best confirms the right patient before administering medication?
options: Ask the patient for their room number only
Compare two identifiers against the medication chart and wristband
Check the medication name against the bedside locker
Confirm the dose with another student nurse
questions.correctAnswer: Compare two identifiers against the medication chart and wristband

questions.prompt: A stage 1 pressure injury presents with non-blanchable redness over intact skin.
Match each isolation precaution to the most appropriate example.
Which finding should the nurse report first when reviewing a postoperative fluid balance chart?
options: Urine output of 20 mL over the last hour
Oral intake of 250 mL with lunch
IV fluids running at the prescribed rate
The patient asking for an extra blanket
questions.correctAnswer: Urine output of 20 mL over the last hour

questions.prompt: A patient says, 'I'm scared about going home after surgery.' Write a short therapeutic response you could use.
questions.sampleResponseGuide: Responses should acknowledge the patient's concern and invite them to share more or ask questions.

questions.prompt: During handover, critical information should be passed on using a structured framework such as ISBAR.
